'''Trif''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Trif system/Legends|Trif system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was under the control of the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic War]], Trif was afflicted by a series of [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquakes]] which have opened up a fissure to a lost, myth-enshrouded [[City/Legends|city]] that was named the "World Below".<ref name="Mission" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' {{Mo}}
